mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conver_messages (id, user_id, role, contents, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{contents,typeHandler=com.zjkl.ai.chat.mapper.ConverMessageContentTypeHandler}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO conver_messages (id, user_id, role, contents, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.role}, #{item.contents,typeHandler=com.zjkl.ai.chat.mapper.ConverMessageContentTypeHandler}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT dates.date_val AS date, SUBSTRING(dates.preview_text, 1, 50) AS preview_text FROM ( SELECT DATE(memory_date) AS date_val, content AS preview_text, 1 AS priority FROM conversation_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date_val, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(contents, '$[0].text')) AS preview_text, 2 AS priority FROM conver_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'assistant' AND is_deleted = 0 ) dates GROUP BY dates.date_val ORDER BY MAX(dates.priority), dates.date_val DESC LIMIT #{limit}
